message:
feat(config): use full glob matching for CONFIG GET patterns

Replace simple prefix-only matching in config_pattern_matches with
fr-store's glob_match, enabling ?, [abc] character classes, and
mid-string wildcards. Add 5 conformance cases for glob patterns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
